name: rom-weaver-react
description: RomWeaver patcher-only webapp and React API

scripts.lint: npm run lint:code && npm run lint:types
scripts.lint:code: biome check package.json index.html vite.config.mjs vitest.config.base.mjs vitest.browser.config.mjs tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.json src tests --diagnostic-level=error
scripts.audit:strings: if rg --hidden --glob '!node_modules/**' --glob '!.git/**' --glob '!dist/**' 'rom-patcher' src tests index.html; then echo 'Found legacy rom-patcher identifiers' && exit 1; else echo 'No legacy rom-patcher identifiers found'; fi
